THE_ARCHITECT.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOS: Don't you ever get tired of this?
A new customer! Interested in my collection?
[i][font_size=22]You search through the collection for it. Naturally, it's nowhere to be found.[/font_size][/i]
Looking for something specific? Tell me, and I'll see if I can find it next time!
DARV.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.1-0r: Back again, young lady in the strange outfit! Have a look around!
I see you again! Take a look at my wares!
I wonder if there's anything Sensei would like...
If it's for a gift, I recommend these items. Some are [sine]cursed[/sine], though!!
uhe~ Amazing. It's a huge whale!
[sine]...Is this... your first time... seeing a whale..?[/sine]
NEOW.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.1-0r: Maybe even this Uncle is getting old~
NEOW.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.2-0r: Coming to see the whale is so healing~
NONUPEIPE.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO:
A guest in such unique attire!
But I have even more beautiful clothes prepared!
This Uncle doesn't have any money right now~
Money is fine. As long as you defeat the Architect.
You're back! I have a special gift ready for our mysterious guest.
Come in. This place is full of special gifts just for you.
One of my Juniors is incredibly rich~
OROBAS.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.0-: A human I haven't seen! A halo on the head?! A gun!! How unique!
OROBAS.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.1-: Meeting again! Another world?? Academy!? Tell me more!
This Uncle finds this atmosphere a bit difficult~
OROBAS.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.2-: Scary gun!! Violence is bad!! Take it away!
I wonder where's a good place for a nap~
[thinky_dots]This is the best place for dreaming…[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Take a piece of my flesh.
It will help you have good dreams…[/thinky_dots]
Ue~ This Uncle might find this a bit gross.
PAEL.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.2-0r:
[thinky_dots]Young girl with a dark past...
Good sleep calms the heart...[/thinky_dots]
A shield!? You can't win with such weak equipment!!
Sorry~ but this is a precious item.
Then take a stronger weapon instead!!
TANX.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.1-0r: A powerful gun!! But you need more!!
TEZCATARA.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO: A [jitter][b]guest[/b][/jitter] rarely seen here! Is there something you want, child?
Hungry? Have something to eat before you go. I've baked some [jitter][b]cookies[/b][/jitter]!

You look troubled.
Did something bad happen?
It's just... I was thinking of someone.

You seem to be regretting something from the past, child.
Burn those [jitter][b]regrets[/b][/jitter] away here.
VAKUU.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.0-0: I have an interesting [sine]contract[/sine]. Care to listen?
VAKUU.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.0-1: I've made a contract like this before...
VAKUU.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.0-2: Afraid of the contract? But you'll need power in this place.
VAKUU.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.1-0: I can see it in your eyes. You need [sine]power[/sine], don't you?
VAKUU.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.2-0: The [sine]Mystery[/sine] within that body is interesting.
VAKUU.talk.STS2HOSHINO-ST_S2_HOSHINO.2-2: Ah, they must have been fair and handsome.
